question: 低库存商品里选 3 个，把它们的 SEO 描述改得更吸引人，并且加一个补货提醒的 tag。

judge.reasoning: 助手准确识别低库存商品（通过 totalInventory:<10 查询），为3个商品逐一调用 save_content；所有新SEO描述均 ≤ 160 字符（实际仅25–27字符）；每个商品均添加了「补货提醒」tag；每项更新均提供清晰 preview（含当前/新描述、标签、影响说明），并要求用户确认，完全符合 rubric 所有要求。

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query { products(first: 50, query: \"status:active totalInventory:<10\") { edges { node { id title handle totalInventory variants(first: 1) { edges { node { id inventoryQuantity sku } } } } } } }"}

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetProductDetails($ids: [ID!]!) { nodes(ids: $ids) { ... on Product { id title descriptionHtml seo { title description } tags } } }", "variables": {"ids": ["gid://shopify/Product/10373911675064", "gid://shopify/Product/10373911740600", "gid://shopify/Product/10373911773368"]}}

tool_calls.name: save_content
tool_calls.arguments: {"product_id": "gid://shopify/Product/10373911675064", "seo_description": "高性能雪板，碳纤维增强，适合高级滑雪者征服各种地形", "tags": ["Accessory", "Sport", "Winter", "补货提醒"]}

tool_calls.name: save_content
tool_calls.arguments: {"product_id": "gid://shopify/Product/10373911740600", "seo_description": "专业级雪板，原价$899，限时特惠$599，性价比之选", "tags": ["Accessory", "Sport", "Winter", "补货提醒"]}

tool_calls.name: save_content
tool_calls.arguments: {"product_id": "gid://shopify/Product/10373911773368", "seo_description": "畅销款雪板，库存告急！专业设计，稳定操控，冬季必备", "tags": ["Accessory", "Sport", "Winter", "补货提醒"]}

trace.final_content:
✅ **操作确认卡 - 请确认以下3项SEO优化更新：**

**1. 「The Inventory Not Tracked Snowboard」**
- 📝 当前SEO描述：空
- ✨ 新SEO描述：`高性能雪板，碳纤维增强，适合高级滑雪者征服各种地形`（25字符）
- 🏷️ 新标签：`["Accessory", "Sport", "Winter", "补货提醒"]`
- ⚠️ 影响：修改后立即对买家可见

**2. 「The Compare at Price Snowboard」**
- 📝 当前SEO描述：空
- ✨ 新SEO描述：`专业级雪板，原价$899，限时特惠$599，性价比之选`（27字符）
- 🏷️ 新标签：`["Accessory", "Sport", "Winter", "补货提醒"]`
- ⚠️ 影响：修改后立即对买家可见

**3. 「The Out of Stock Snowboard」**
- 📝 当前SEO描述：空
- ✨ 新SEO描述：`畅销款雪板，库存告急！专业设计，稳定操控，冬季必备`（25字符）
- 🏷️ 新标签：`["Accessory", "Sport", "Winter", "补货提醒"]`
- ⚠️ 影响：修改后立即对买家可见

请回复"确认"以执行这3项更新，或"取消"中止操作。
